offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual categorization causes delays in report generation. We automate expense categorization instead of manual expense tracking and categorization using spreadsheets.
problem: Manual categorization of expenses leads to time-consuming reports and potential errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for sharing accounting tools
try_it: Let users try user-friendly interface for manual adjustments on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
